name: Tailscode
subtitle: Remote for AI coding agents
promotionalText: Prompt from your couch. Watch the turn land on your Lock Screen — thinking, tool runs, approvals — over your own tailnet. No relay, no account, no tracking.
description:
Tailscode turns your iPhone into the remote control for the coding agents already running on your machines. Send a prompt from anywhere, pocket your phone, and watch the turn finish on your Lock Screen.

It connects point-to-point over your own Tailscale network. No relay servers, no account, no analytics, no middleman reading your code.

WORKS WITH YOUR AGENTS
• opencode — connect straight to opencode serve and drive any provider you have configured.
• Claude Code — via claude-bridge, the open-source companion server that turns Claude Code into structured streaming sessions backed by your subscription.

A LIVE, NATIVE TRANSCRIPT
• Real-time streaming with collapsible thinking and tool-activity groups.
• Syntax-highlighted code blocks with one-tap, byte-exact copy.
• Inline permission approvals — Allow once, Always, or Deny without leaving the chat.
• Agent questions rendered as tappable option cards.
• Steer mid-turn: queue a follow-up while the agent works, edit it before it lands, or stop the turn server-side.
• Slash-command palette, per-message model and reasoning-effort overrides, conversation forking, session cost meters.

YOUR LOCK SCREEN IS THE STATUS BOARD
• A Live Activity per session: phase, elapsed time, and tool counts in real time — thinking, running a tool, writing, or awaiting your approval.
• Approval requests alert you; finished turns linger with the outcome.
• Tap to deep-link into the exact chat. Updates arrive by push even while the app is suspended.

BUILT FOR MULTIPLE MACHINES
• One session list across all your servers, grouped by machine, with live status.
• Tailnet discovery: paste a Tailscale API token and Tailscode finds the agent servers on your devices.
• Server-side file browser to start a chat in any project directory.
• Health checks, auto-reconnect, offline banners.
• Live usage gauges: Claude plan limits, Grok quotas, opencode cost estimates.

NATIVE TO THE CORE
• Programmatic UIKit, Swift 6, zero web views. Liquid Glass on iOS 26.
• Dark mode, Dynamic Type, haptics.
• Open source under GPL-3.0 — the app, the engine, and the bridge.

FREE, WITH AN HONEST PRO
The free app is the complete core: one server, full chat, permissions, attachments, models, forking, and Live Activities. Tailscode Pro — a one-time purchase, no subscription — adds multiple saved servers, concurrent Live Activities, and a supporter badge.

TRY IT BEFORE YOU WIRE ANYTHING
A built-in demo lets you explore every screen with sample sessions — no server needed.

REQUIREMENTS
A computer on your Tailscale network (free for personal use) running opencode or Claude Code via claude-bridge. Tailscode is independent open-source software: not affiliated with or endorsed by Anthropic, Tailscale Inc., or the opencode project.

Privacy policy: https://midgarcorp.cc/tailscode/privacy
Source code: https://github.com/guitaripod/Tailscode
reviewNotes:
Tailscode is a native client for coding-agent servers (opencode, and Claude Code via the open-source claude-bridge) that developers run on their own machines and reach over their private Tailscale VPN (WireGuard). There is no account, no sign-in, and no server operated by us.

HOW TO REVIEW: on the first screen tap "No server yet? Try the demo". The demo installs two sample servers with realistic scripted sessions and exercises every feature: streaming transcripts, tool activity, inline permission approvals (open "Dark mode for the settings screen"), agent questions (open "Ship the pricing page A/B test"), the model picker, usage gauges, and the file browser (compose button). Typing in any demo chat streams a scripted reply.

ATS / arbitrary loads: the app talks HTTP to hosts on the user's own WireGuard-encrypted tailnet (CGNAT 100.64/10 addresses); such hosts cannot present CA-signed certificates for raw IPs, and traffic never crosses the public internet in plaintext.

In-app purchases: Tailscode Pro is a one-time convenience unlock (multiple saved servers, concurrent Live Activities, supporter badge); the three tips are voluntary. The complete core is free, and nothing is disabled if an entitlement lapses.
